title: Gtechniq T1 Durable Tyre Gel for Car Tyre Shine, Car Wheel Cleaner Repels Water, Dirt and Grime, Restores Tyre Black Finish, Anti-Sling Formula, 100% Biodegradable, 250ml
features: MAKES TYRES LOOK BRAND NEW AND REPELS DIRT - simply wipe on to give your tyres a 'showroom-finish' with a rich, deep black gloss colour that repels dirt and and water to keep them looking better for longer - a must-have for your car cleaning kit
NON SLING FORMULA PROTECTS YOUR PAINTWORK – the advanced tyre dressing formulation bonds with the tyres so it doesn't get slung onto your car's bodywork as soon as you start to drive
EASY TO USE - simply wipe on whenever you wash your car to bring your tyres back to black and help them stay looking glossy and clean for longer

MADE BY THE WORLD LEADER IN MOLECULAR NANOTECHNOLOGY – founded in 2001 by a quantum physicist, Gtechniq's car cleaning products use innovative, advanced technology to achieve a level of performance that outclasses any others on the market

100% CUSTOMER SATISFACTION FROM UK BASED GLOBAL COMPANY – sold in 50 countries worldwide, Gtechniq's been the no 1 choice of high-end vehicles for over 20 years, and is passionate about the quality of its products and the stellar service it provides
description: Product Description REPELS DIRT AND GRIME AND RESTORES BLACK FINISH TO TYRES ANTI-SLING FORMULA STOPS THE DRESSING FROM FLYING ONTO THE BODYWORK SIMPLY APPLY DRESSING TO PAD AND WIPE OVER TYRES AND BUFF T1 Durable Tyre Gel W7 Tar and Glue Remover W4 Pre Wash Cleaner Snow Foam W6 Iron and Fallout Remover C2 Crystal Lacquer Ceramic Coating I1 Smart Fabric Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 304 4.4 out of 5 stars 3,961 4.4 out of 5 stars 566 4.5 out of 5 stars 3,098 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,516 4.6 out of 5 stars 415 Price £12.95 £ 12 . 95 £9.95 £ 9 . 95 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £11.95 £ 11 . 95 £19.50 £ 19 . 50 — no data Functionality Super durable formula leaves your tyres with a durable, deep, rich, durable shine Instantly dissolves tar, glue spots and residue off your paintwork Loosens dirt, built-up road grime and stubborn bug splatters Removes brake dust, fall out and grease Resists minor scratches, protects against dirt and swirl marks Water repellent coating that bonds to the fabric so liquids simply roll off PTFE Free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Paintwork All types All types All types All types All types All types
